General.Name: Audacia SAS
General.Description: Audacia SA is a venture capital and private equity firm specializing in startups, growth capital, emerging growth, mature, SMEs family businesses, mezzanine and real estate investments. The firm prefers to invest in all sectors, with a focus on consumer goods, hotel and catering, industrials, Business-to-Business and Business-to-Consumer services, quantum communication, quantum computing, innovative physics and quantum sensors. It typically invests in France. The firm seeks to invest between "2 million ($2.16 million) and "10 million ($10.82 million) in the form of convertible bonds and can make equity investment between "0.5 million ($0.54 million) and "10 million ($10.82 million). The firm generally targets companies with sale revenues between "5 million ($5.41 million) and "250 million ($270.39 million). Audacia SA was founded in 2006 and is based in Paris, France.
